<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Intervention\Gif\Blocks; use Intervention\Gif\AbstractEntity; class Header extends AbstractEntity { /** * Header signature */ public const SIGNATURE = 'GIF'; /** * Current GIF version */ protected string $version = '89a'; /** * Set GIF version */ public function setVersion(string $value): self { $this->version = $value; return $this; } /** * Return current version */ public function getVersion(): string { return $this->version; } }
